profileSettings.title: Profile Settings
profileSettings.contactWarning:
⚠️ Important: If you change your phone number, it will be marked as unverified.
You’ll need to verify the new number with an OTP the next time you log in.
profileSettings.usernameWarning:
⚠️ Important:

After you change your email, your old email will no longer work for login.

Please verify your new email address to continue using it for login.

You can still sign in anytime using your verified contact number.

add_user_form.title: Add New Employee
add_user_form.tech_officer_notice: New Tech Officer accounts start as Inactive and must be activated by an admin before login.
add_user_form.admin_notice: New Admin accounts are set to Inactive. Admin must verify email on first login. Status is locked to Inactive.
add_user_form.tto_reuse_notice_title: Heads up! You are about to reuse an existing Temporary Tech Officer account.
add_user_form.tto_reuse_notice_body: The new effective period will be updated.
add_user_form.tto_create_notice_body1: You are about to create a Temporary Tech Officer account.
add_user_form.tto_create_notice_body2: This user will temporarily have the same full access privileges as the main Tech Officer.
add_user_form.tto_create_notice_body3: The main Tech Officer can still log in while this temporary account is active to monitor any actions performed.
add_user_form.tto_create_notice_body4: Please set an expiration date and disable access once the main Tech Officer returns.
add_user_form.new_main_to_notice_body1: You are about to transfer your Tech Officer role to another user.
add_user_form.new_main_to_notice_body3: Use an existing Temporary Tech Officer account, or
add_user_form.new_main_to_notice_body4: Create a new Tech Officer account.
add_user_form.new_main_to_notice_body5: Once the transfer is complete, your account will be set to inactive, and the selected user will gain full Tech Officer access to all farms, reports, and user management features.
add_user_form.new_main_to_notice_body6: Please double-check all details before confirming. This action cannot be undone without reactivation.
add_user_form.tto_creation_mode_reuse: Reuse Existing Temporary Tech Officer Account
add_user_form.tto_creation_mode_create: Create New Temporary Tech Officer Account
add_user_form.tto_remarks_placeholder: Provide details for the selected reason
add_user_form.tto_select_existing_label: Select Existing Temporary Tech Officer Account
add_user_form.tto_reuse_only_inactive_note: Only inactive Temporary Tech Officer accounts are available for reuse.
add_user_form.new_main_to_creation_mode_label: New Main Tech Officer Creation Mode
add_user_form.new_main_to_remarks_placeholder: Enter any additional remarks or notes...
add_user_form.new_main_to_select_existing_label: Select Existing New Main Tech Officer Account
add_user_form.new_main_to_select_existing_placeholder: Choose a former Temporary Tech Officer account to promote to New Main Tech Officer
add_user_form.new_main_to_reuse_only_inactive_note: Only inactive users who have been Temporary Tech Officers are available for promotion to New Main Tech Officer

fresh.caution: Some farms show early signs of risk.

outdated.good: Conditions were stable across all farms during the last update.
outdated.caution: Some farms previously showed signs of risk; new updates may be needed.
outdated.critical: Several farms were at high risk; confirm if conditions persist.

fresh.good: Stable farm conditions based on recent monitoring data.

outdated.good: Farm conditions were stable during the last update.
outdated.caution: Moderate conditions were observed earlier; potential risks may have developed.
outdated.critical: High-risk conditions were detected previously; verify current status.
